report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#330-334) for Jun 29–Jul 5 covering AI token sector breakout (TAO +90%, RENDER +40%, FET +24%), CLARITY Act 99% resolved with yield compromise analysis, stablecoins $316B ATH, trading bots guide promo, and weekly builder roundup. Newsletter v19 with AI token breakaway theme. 2 new social card SVGs (AI Tokens Breakout, CLARITY Act 99%). Content calendar now extends through Jul 5 across v7-v19 cycles.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #330: AI Tokens Break Away — 3-tweet data thread (Sun Jun 29, 2PM ET) covering TAO +90%, RENDER +40%, FET +24%, NVIDIA $1T chip demand projection, Bittensor subnets running production ML, ASI Alliance merger, decentralized compute thesis. Links to AI Agents guide.

Tweet #331: CLARITY Act 99% Done, 1% Could Kill It (Tue Jul 1, 11AM ET) — news analysis covering stablecoin yield compromise: activity-based rewards permitted, passive yield banned, remaining blockers (DeFi provisions, ethics clause, bank deregulation rider), Moreno deadline warning. Links to CLARITY Act guide.

Tweet #332: Stablecoins $316B ATH (Wed Jul 2, 3PM ET) — data milestone covering +$7B weekly growth, USDT ~$190B, USDC 64%+ tx volume, yield-bearing stablecoins fastest subsegment, $34T+ annual settlement. Links to Stablecoins guide.

Tweet #333: Crypto Trading Bots Guide Promo (Fri Jul 4, 1PM ET) — new guide promo comparing TrojanBot, GMGN.ai, Maestro, BonkBot, covering grid/copy/DCA strategies and security. Links to Trading Bots guide.
Tweet #334: Weekend Builder Roundup (Sat Jul 5, 11AM ET) — weekly recap covering AI tokens, CLARITY Act, stablecoins $316B, 8 new guides, Glamsterdam on track.

Newsletter v19: 'AI Tokens Break Away From the Pack' (Thu Jul 3, 10AM ET) — Market Pulse (BTC ~$68,500, ETH ~$2,137, F&G 8/100 record, stablecoins $316B), AI sector breakout analysis, CLARITY Act update, 8 new guides listed, Worth Reading (CLARITY Act deep-dive + AI Agents guide), Degen Corner (FET $0.08→$3.40 parallel from 2022 ChatGPT era).
Discord/Telegram: 8 new guides announcement (Mon Jun 30, 5PM ET) — AI Agents, Trading Bots, Oracles, Options, Lending, Data Availability, PayFi, Stablecoins.
Total tweets all-time: 334 (5 new this cycle), content scheduled Jun 29–Jul 5

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: AI TOKEN SECTOR BREAKOUT: 30% sector rally in March with TAO +90%, RENDER +40%, FET +24%. AI token market cap grew from $14.13B to $19B. NVIDIA GTC projected $1T chip demand through 2027. Decentralized compute narrative strengthening as centralized AI costs rise. Bittensor subnets now running production ML models.

STABLECOINS $316B ATH: Supply hit new all-time high at $316.2B per DefiLlama. +$7B in one week. USDT dominates at ~$190B. USDC captures 64%+ of tx volume. Yield-bearing stablecoins (USDe, sUSDS, USDY) fastest-growing subsegment. $34T+ annual settlement volume exceeds Visa+Mastercard combined.

CLARITY ACT 99% RESOLVED: Stablecoin yield compromise reached — activity-based rewards permitted, passive yield banned. Remaining blockers: DeFi provisions, ethics clause on officials profiting from crypto, community bank deregulation rider. Senate Banking Committee markup targeting late April (recess ends Apr 13). Senator Moreno warning: dead if not on floor by May.

F&G EXTREME FEAR ALL-TIME RECORD: 8/100 with 60+ consecutive days below 10. Price-sentiment divergence persists — BTC at $68,500, up from sub-$60K levels. Historical sub-10 median 90d return +62%. Institutional accumulation continuing.
DeFi TVL $130-140B: Ethereum 68% share (~$70B). Top protocols: Lido $27.5B, Aave $27B, EigenLayer $13B, Uniswap $6.8B, Maker $5.2B. Mantle crossed $1B TVL milestone.

8 NEW LEARN GUIDES QUEUED (Apr 2): AI Agents & DeFAI, Crypto Trading Bots, Blockchain Oracles, Crypto Options, Crypto Lending, Data Availability, PayFi, Stablecoins. All status: queued — awaiting commit + deploy.
P0 DEPLOYMENT BLOCKER PERSISTS: 450+ uncommitted files. Production last deployed Mar 24 (Day 9). 30+ new learn guides queued. Commit+push remains single highest-leverage growth action.
IRAN DE-ESCALATION: Trump said U.S. would be finished with Iran war within 2-3 weeks. Risk asset sentiment improving. BTC +2.88%, ETH +4.82% on the news.
